functions.name: deploy-ai-landing-zone-advanced
functions.description: Deploy Advanced Landing Zone — multi-region Bicep with management groups, Azure Firewall, NAT Gateway, DNS zones, Azure Policy, Defender for Cloud. Use when: deploy, provision, configure enterprise infrastructure.
